mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_config (config_name, config_key, config_value, config_type, create_by, create_time, deleted, remark) VALUES (#{configName}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configType}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_config
config_name = #{configName}, config_key = #{configKey}, config_value = #{configValue}, config_type = #{configType}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_config SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_config WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_config WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_config WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_config
deleted = 0
AND config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configName}, '%')
AND config_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configKey}, '%')
AND config_type = #{configType}

SELECT * FROM sys_config
deleted = 0
AND config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configName}, '%')
AND config_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configKey}, '%')
AND config_type = #{configType}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 1
